errors.description: The policy proof bundle is missing a canonical policy pack hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny proof export or verification until policy hash continuity is present

errors.description: The policy proof bundle is missing a canonical request context hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny proof export or verification until request context hash continuity is present

errors.description: The policy proof bundle cannot prove verified simulation/runtime parity.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny proof export or verification until runtime parity is verified

errors.description: The policy proof bundle contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny proof export or verification until diagnostics contain no secrets or raw approvals

errors.description: The policy proof bundle is malformed or missing required proof fields.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny proof verification until bundle structure is canonical and complete
